title: citronella megaphylla
intro: Citronella megaphylla, also known as Java citronella, is a species of grass native to Indonesia and Malaysia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of citronella megaphylla are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of citronella megaphylla include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are often used to repel insects and promote relaxation.
